She later kills her husband to avenge the death of her son by his father's hand and is then arrested and sentenced to death. description: An undefeated legend of the Mixed Martial Arts fighting championship. He is a tyrant in the ring and also known as the strongest man in the world. Calling him repeatedly to have him accept the contract, Jaekyung sees Dan as a way to continue winning in the fighting ring.
